Home / For Operations Leaders
FOR OPERATIONS DIRECTORS & PLANT MANAGERS

Stop paying for failures you could have prevented.

SAM4 detects rotating asset failures 4-8 weeks before they happen. Eliminate unplanned downtime, recover lost capacity, and prove 800% ROI to the board.

Request a Demo See Customer Results

Every unplanned shutdown has a price. Most plants pay it repeatedly.

Average cost per failure: €50K+. Most industrial plants run blind to 30-40% of critical assets. A single preventable shutdown can erase a year's margin. SAM4 changes that by giving operations teams the foresight to act before motors fail, bearings seize, or gearboxes break.

What SAM4 delivers. Named customers. Quantified outcomes.

Real plants. Real savings.

Water & Wastewater

Yorkshire Water

35 pollution incidents prevented. 70,000 manual inspections replaced. £9.8M avoided.

Read the story → Airports

Schiphol Airport

Continuous monitoring of baggage handling motors. Unplanned downtime reduced from 3+ hours to zero.

Read the story → Metals & Mining

Nyrstar

Critical smelter asset failures detected weeks early. Avoided €2.1M in emergency repairs.

Read the story →

Simple to deploy. Fast to value.

Four steps from installation to early detection.

1
Connect
Install sensors on critical motors.
2
Baseline
Platform learns your asset signature.
3
Detect
Real-time anomaly alerts begin.
4
Act
Maintenance team plans shutdown.

Customer Voice

"We moved from reactive to condition-based maintenance on 200 critical pumps. Downtime dropped 40%, and we caught two catastrophic failures before they happened. The platform pays for itself in early warnings alone."

Operations Director, Water Utility
